title: hypericum sewense
intro: Hypericum sewense, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Hypericaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the enzyme responsible for breaking down neurotransmitters, such as serotonin and dopamine. The health benefits of St. John's Wort include its potential to reduce symptoms of mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of St. John's Wort include teas, tinctures, capsules, and creams, which can be used to support mental health and well-being.
